testcase.name: test_create_lead_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lead_status_master.py:89: in test_create_lead_status assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create status: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create status: {"detail":"Only admins can manage lead statuses"} E assert 403 in [200, 201] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_lead_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lead_status_master.py:122: in test_update_lead_status assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 403 in [200, 201] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_lead_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lead_status_master.py:155: in test_delete_lead_status assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 403 in [200, 201] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
